# makena

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
df <- read_csv("data/restrooms.csv")
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude)) + 
  geom_point()

```

```{r}
parks <- df |> filter(`Location Type` == "Park")
ggplot(parks, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude)) + 
  geom_point()

```


```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = `Location Type`, fill = Status)) + 
  geom_bar()

```
make a graph of percentage of bathrooms that are non operational per location
cleveland dot plot of who is in charge of all of the bathrooms
year round vs seasonal
changing stations and location
figure out how to get burough in the so we can look at distribution of burough per location type
